title: Rural Farmlands (Acquisition and Regrant) (Prescribed Forms) Rules, 1966
title_en: Rural Farmlands (Acquisition and Regrant) (Prescribed Forms) Rules, 1966

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Rules may be cited as the Rural Farmlands (Acquisition and Regrant) (Prescribed Forms) Rules.

provisions.title: Forms
provisions.content: The forms in the Schedule hereto, or forms to a like effect, shall be used in all matters to which they refer.

provisions.title: Forms in Land Acquisition Act
provisions.content: In all other cases, the forms prescribed in the Schedule to the Land Acquisition Act 1 or to the like effect, shall be used in all matters to which they refer, with such necessary alteration, additions and variations as the circumstances of the case require. 1 Cap. 118 Schedule (Rule 2) Forms [Editorial note: The forms have not been reproduced.] History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
